calendar.matters:
Attorney In Fact'S Petn. Fo Order Auth. Establishment Of A Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Senick for and with Thomas Benson. Kirk Johnson (Porposed Beneficiary) also present.

Mr. Johnson stated that he agreed to waiver of accountings, to the waiver of Court approval of the Attorney's fees and the Fiduciary's fees, and to the selection of Ms. Adler as the trust protector. The Court found that Kirk Johnson knowingly, freely and voluntarily agreed to and understands the waivers. The Court granted the petition, (subject to review of the order).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.
